name: openEuler sig-DPU SIG
description: Sig-DPU is expected to sommon DPU vendors and developers over domestic and international, exploring DPU's ability to provide better programmability and customizability for data-center and cloud.

name: openEuler sig-DPU SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-DPU SIG maintains 3 repositories in the Cloud Computing and Containers domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-DPU SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Sig-DPU is expected to sommon DPU vendors and developers over domestic and international, exploring DPU's ability to provide better programmability and customizability for data-center and cloud.. The SIG has 12 core members and maintains 3 repositories in the Cloud Computing and Containers domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-DPU SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-DPU SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-DPU SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-DPU SIG maintains 3 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-DPU.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-DPU SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-DPU SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Li Cheng, Li Chunhui, Deng Guangxing. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
